data.title: Tencent Cloud launches Agent Memory, a service that remembers lobsters.
data.description: Tencent Cloud officially launched its "Lobster" memory service—TencentDB Agent Memory—adding a long-term memory layer to OpenClaw. Currently, Agent Memory is seamlessly integrated into Tencent Cloud products such as Lighthouse and ClawPro as a plugin, and can be activated for free with a single click. (Jinshi)

data.title: Oil Trading Strategy Yields Significant Profits Amid Market Challenges
data.description: An analyst @ai_9684xtpa posted on X that a trading strategy focusing on long positions in crude oil has achieved a 100% success rate despite challenging market conditions. The trader, operating from the address 0x7f5…5f47e, closed a position last night involving 109,000 CL tokens, resulting in a profit of $913,000. The total value of the position was $12.11 million. This marks the third profitable long position this month, with cumulative earnings exceeding $2.71 million from individual trades.

data.title: Tencent Cloud Launches 'Lobster' Memory Service for OpenClaw
data.description: Tencent Cloud has officially introduced the 'Lobster' memory service, known as TencentDB Agent Memory, enhancing OpenClaw with long-term memory capabilities. According to Odaily, this service is seamlessly integrated as a plugin into Tencent Cloud products such as Lighthouse and ClawPro, allowing users to activate it with a single click at no cost.

data.title: Babylon Token Unlock Scheduled for April 10
data.description: Babylon is set to unlock approximately 38.125 million tokens on April 10 at 10:00 AM UTC+8. According to ChainCatcher, this token release is part of the ongoing schedule outlined by Web3 asset data platform RootData. The value of the unlocked tokens is estimated at $5.55 million.

data.title: This week's top mining news highlights: Cango completes $75 million funding round to advance compliance reforms and expand its AI business; Trump family mining company American Bitcoin increases its holdings by 399 BTC, bringing its total holdings to 6,899 BTC.
data.description: 1. According to cloverpool, the average hashrate of the Bitcoin network is 997 EH/s, with a high of 1157 EH/s and a low of 905 EH/s, up 0.17% from the average hashrate of the previous week (995 EH/s). 2. According to blockchain.com, the average price of Bitcoin is $67,200, with a high of $69,286 and a low of $64,939, down 3.97% from the average price of the previous week ($69,980). 3. Mining news worth noting includes: (1) Cango completed a $75 million financing round, which will promote compliance rectification and deploy AI business; (2) Mining company MARA laid off about 15% of its staff and transformed towards AI and digital infrastructure; (3) CoinShares: Bitcoin mining companies are approaching break-even and are accelerating their shift to AI business; (4) Trump family mining company American Bitcoin increased its holdings by 399 BTC, bringing its total holdings to 6899 BTC. Data partner: Cango Inc. (CANG), a NYSE-listed Bitcoin mining company.

data.title: Ondo Finance Freezes Stolen USDY Tokens
data.description: Ondo Finance, a platform for tokenizing real-world assets, has frozen 477,000 USDY tokens stolen by an attacker on Drift. According to Foresight News, this action was taken to prevent the attacker from accessing the stolen funds. The incident highlights ongoing security challenges in the cryptocurrency sector.

data.title: Whale Closes Oil Position with Significant Profit
data.description: On April 3, a significant transaction was observed in the cryptocurrency market. According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, a whale identified as '0x7f5' closed its long position in crude oil (CL), securing a profit of $913,789. This whale has engaged in three long positions on CL, achieving a total profit of $2.7 million with a 100% success rate.

data.title: U.S. President Trump Discusses Military Strategy on Social Media
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump recently shared on social media that the U.S. military has yet to target remaining sites in Iran. According to BlockBeats, he indicated that future targets could include bridges and power plants. Trump emphasized that the new regime leadership is aware of the necessary actions and the urgency required.

data.title: Satsuma Technology Increases Bitcoin Holdings
data.description: Satsuma Technology, a UK-listed company, has increased its Bitcoin holdings. According to BlockBeats, the company purchased an additional 25.65 Bitcoins, bringing its total holdings to 645.7 Bitcoins.

data.title: Riot Platforms Reports Decline in Bitcoin Production for Q1 2026
data.description:
Riot Platforms has released its unaudited production and operational data for the first quarter of 2026. According to Odaily, the company produced 1,473 BTC during this period, averaging 16.4 BTC per day, marking a 4% decrease compared to the previous year. The quarter also saw the sale of 3,778 BTC, generating net revenue of $289.5 million, with an average selling price of $76,626 per BTC. By the end of the quarter, Riot Platforms held 15,680 BTC, including 5,802 restricted bitcoins, reflecting an 18% year-over-year reduction.

In terms of computing power, Riot Platforms achieved a total deployed hash rate of 42.5 EH/s, a 26% increase from the previous year, while the average operational hash rate reached 36.4 EH/s, up 23%. The equipment efficiency improved by 4% to 20.2 J/TH. The total electricity credits amounted to $21 million, a significant 171% increase, with demand response credits contributing $7.5 million, up 278%. The overall electricity cost decreased to 3.0 cents per kilowatt-hour, a 21% reduction year-over-year.

data.title: Alkimi Develops Transparent Rewards Engine on Sui Network
data.description: Alkimi has announced the development of a transparent rewards engine on the Sui network. According to NS3.AI, this system will feature a quest-based XP system, a real-time advertising leaderboard, and an auto-compounding feature. The initiative aims to enhance user engagement and streamline advertising processes on the platform.

data.title: Middle East Conflict Resolution Could Impact U.S. Treasury Yields
data.description: Daiwa Securities strategist Shun Otani suggests that if a resolution is reached in the Middle East conflict, the yield on the U.S. 10-year Treasury could decrease from its current 4.30% to approximately 4.20%. According to Odaily, Otani highlights that once hostilities subside, market attention may shift towards ensuring safe navigation through the Strait of Hormuz and repairing relations between Iran and Gulf countries, which have deteriorated during the conflict. He views the meeting of foreign ministers from over 40 countries regarding the situation in the strait and reports of negotiations between Iran and Oman as positive signals towards de-escalation.

data.title: Cosmos Ecosystem's Leap Wallet to Cease Operations in May
data.description: Cosmos ecosystem wallet application, Leap Wallet, is set to cease operations on May 28. According to BlockBeats, users are advised to complete their migrations promptly. The shutdown will also affect Compass Wallet (extension, iOS, Android), Leap WebApp, Swapfast, Leap Cosmos Hub validator node, and Leap Cosmos Snaps.

data.title: Xiaomi to Adjust Product Prices Amid Rising Component Costs
data.description: On April 3, Xiaomi announced that due to the significant increase in global storage chip and other key component prices, the company will adjust the suggested retail prices of some products starting April 11, 2026, at 00:00. According to Jin10, Xiaomi's President Lu Weibing stated on social media that the current surge in memory prices has exceeded expectations, with prices for the same version of memory rising nearly fourfold compared to Q1 last year. The price for 12+512 memory has increased by approximately 1,500 yuan, while the 16+1T version has seen an even more dramatic rise. This situation has greatly impacted REDMI, known for its competitive pricing strategy. As a result, Xiaomi will slightly increase or restore the retail prices of certain models.

data.title: Bittensor's Market Cap Surges as Subnet 3 Releases Covenant-72B
data.description: TAO's value nearly doubled in March, reaching approximately $317, which boosted Bittensor's market capitalization to just over $3 billion. According to NS3.AI, this increase coincided with the release of Subnet 3's Covenant-72B. The 72-billion-parameter model was trained across more than 70 distributed nodes and achieved a score of 67.1 on the MMLU benchmark, placing it competitively alongside Meta's Llama 2 70B. Currently, over 68% of the 10.7 million issued TAO is staked.

data.title: Hyperliquid's Market Share in Perpetual Futures Trading Approaches 6%
data.description: Hyperliquid has achieved a nearly 6% share in the perpetual futures trading market, with its monthly trading volume reaching $200 billion. According to NS3.AI, this increase in market share indicates that Hyperliquid's growth surpasses the general rise in trading activity.

data.title: Pixie Chess Secures $5.2 Million in Seed Funding
data.description: Pixie Chess, a Web3-based chess platform, has successfully raised $5.2 million in a seed funding round. According to Foresight News, the investment was led by Paradigm, with participation from SEED CLUB and several angel investors. The funding aims to enhance the platform's development and expand its reach in the digital chess community.

data.title: Trader loracle.hl is selling 450,000 HYPE tokens, worth $15.98 million.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, trader loracle.hl (@loraclexyz) is selling 450,000 HYPE tokens, worth $15.98 million. In the past 9 hours, he sold 311,900 HYPE tokens through limit orders, worth $10.97 million, leaving 138,100 HYPE tokens remaining, worth $4.91 million.

data.title: Gyeonggi Province Initiates Stablecoin Research Project
data.description: Gyeonggi Province has commissioned a research project to develop an implementation plan for a stablecoin. According to NS3.AI, this initiative represents the first instance of a local government formally ordering such a study following prior discussions at the council level. Officials stated that the project aims to prepare for the expansion of blockchain-based financial infrastructure and to engage in ongoing regulatory discussions.

data.title: Alibaba's Qwen3.6-Plus Achieves High Ranking on CodeArena's Global List
data.description: Alibaba's Qwen3.6-Plus has secured the second position on CodeArena's global programming model list. According to NS3.AI, this achievement places it ahead of models from OpenAI, Google, and xAI, making it the highest-ranked Chinese large model on the leaderboard.
